title: myroxylon pringlei
intro: Myroxylon pringlei, also known as Palo Santo, is a plant species in the legume family. It is native to Mexico and has been used for centuries in traditional medicine due to its medicinal properties, which include antimicrobial, anti-inflammatory, and antioxidant effects. The health benefits of Palo Santo include relieving stress and anxiety, reducing pain and inflammation, and improving respiratory issues such as bronchitis and asthma. Palo Santo is often used in herbal preparations, including essential oils, infusions, and tinctures, which can be used to promote relaxation, reduce stress, and improve overall well-being.
